unit.description: Dingen vergelijken: groter dan, het grootst, even snel als.

drills.prompt_en: This book is better than the previous one.
drills.canonical_dutch: Dit boek is beter dan het vorige.
drills.expected_english: This book is better than the previous one.

drills.prompt_en: Amsterdam is the largest city in the Netherlands.
drills.canonical_dutch: Amsterdam is de grootste stad van Nederland.
drills.expected_english: Amsterdam is the largest city in the Netherlands.

drills.prompt_en: She is just as tall as her brother.
drills.canonical_dutch: Zij is even lang als haar broer.
drills.expected_english: She is just as tall as her brother.

drills.prompt_en: Today is the warmest day of the year.
drills.canonical_dutch: Vandaag is de warmste dag van het jaar.
drills.expected_english: Today is the warmest day of the year.

drills.prompt_en: The train is faster than the bus.
drills.canonical_dutch: De trein is sneller dan de bus.
drills.expected_english: The train is faster than the bus.

drills.prompt_en: Choose the correct translation of: My new car is much more expensive than the old one.
drills.canonical_dutch: Mijn nieuwe auto is veel duurder dan de oude.
drills.expected_english: My new car is much more expensive than the old one.
options: Mijn nieuwe auto is veel duurder dan de oude.
Mijn auto nieuw veel duur de oude.
Mijn nieuwste auto duurst de oude.
Veel duurder mijn nieuwe oude auto.

drills.prompt_en: Choose the correct translation of: This is the best restaurant in town.
drills.canonical_dutch: Dit is het beste restaurant in de stad.
drills.expected_english: This is the best restaurant in town.
options: Dit is het beste restaurant in de stad.
Het is beste restaurant van stad.

drills.prompt_en: Choose the correct translation of: The weather today is worse than yesterday.
drills.canonical_dutch: Het weer is vandaag slechter dan gisteren.
drills.expected_english: The weather today is worse than yesterday.
options: Het weer is vandaag slechter dan gisteren.
Het weer is slecht vandaag dan gisteren.

drills.prompt_en: Fill in the blank: Mijn fiets is ___ dan jouw fiets.
Fill in the blank: Hij is de ___ leerling van de klas.
Fill in the blank: Anna loopt even snel ___ Tom.
Say in Dutch: This is the most interesting book I have ever read.
drills.canonical_dutch: Dit is het interessantste boek dat ik ooit heb gelezen.
drills.expected_english: This is the most interesting book I have ever read.

drills.prompt_en: Say in Dutch: My sister is older than I am.
drills.canonical_dutch: Mijn zus is ouder dan ik.
drills.expected_english: My sister is older than I am.

drills.prompt_en: Say in Dutch: Cycling is healthier than driving a car.
drills.expected_english: Cycling is healthier than driving a car.

drills.prompt_en: Say in Dutch: This is the cheapest option that we have.
drills.canonical_dutch: Dit is de goedkoopste optie die we hebben.
drills.expected_english: This is the cheapest option that we have.
